message:
fix: API logger creates parent dir, eval-task.sh preserves manifest

NewAPILogger now calls MkdirAll before opening the log file, fixing
"no such file or directory" when --state-dir hasn't been created yet.
eval-task.sh adds mkdir -p after rm -rf so the manifest upload lands
in the right place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,6 +99,7 @@ cd $REMOTE_DIR
 set -a; source .env; set +a
 export PATH="\$HOME/.local/bin:\$PATH"
 rm -rf /tmp/$JOB_NAME
+mkdir -p /tmp/$JOB_NAME
 
 nohup harbor run \\
   --agent-import-path "$AGENT_IMPORT_PATH" \\
